criteria.criterion: Concurrent inserts into disjoint subtrees proceed without blocking each other
criteria.method: many goroutines, each confined to a far-apart key range, run concurrently under -race; no deadlock/hang; all keys correct afterward

criteria.criterion: Concurrent inserts into the same subtree remain correct
criteria.method: many goroutines with interleaved keys forcing shared-node contention and concurrent splits (including likely root splits); final tree has every key exactly once, structurally valid

criteria.criterion: No writer ever holds more than a parent+child latch pair at once
criteria.method: window-of-2 discipline in descent/propagation/findParent (see plan.md); -race also flags any unsynchronized access, which would surface a violation indirectly

criteria.criterion: No regressions in existing single-threaded Insert path
criteria.method: free-function Insert left byte-for-byte unchanged; all pre-existing tests (TestInsertEmptyTree, TestInsertUpsert, TestInsertSplit, TestInsertOutOfOrder, delete/lookup/scan suites) must stay green

criteria.criterion: No flakiness in new concurrent test
